company_overview.name: Tamara
company_overview.market_position: Tamara + Tabby duopoly (~93% of KSA BNPL market)

facility_terms.spv: Tamara Capital UAE Designated Activity Company (Ireland)

ecl_movement.Tamara Group: Actual losses booked (provision + write off - recovery) over the Historical Period.

financials.line_item: Acquisition Costs (KYC, Credit Checks and new customer DBRs)
One/off Adjustment in Finance Costs -> Share Warrants

data_notes: Dilution = refunds/cancellations as % of eligible originated
Write-off occurs at DPD 90. Recovery efforts continue post write-off.
BNPL product types: Pi2 (Pay in 2), Pi3, Pi4, Pi6
BNPL+ product types: Pi4, Pi6, Pi9, Pi12, Pi24 (Murabaha profit-bearing)
Pi6 exists in both BNPL and BNPL+ segments
Securitisation facility: Project Gasoline 2.0 — UAE Securitisation
Eligible receivable criteria: resident, 18+, max balance, no 30-day-late in prior 12M, down payment paid
Repayment Status and Transaction History: whole-book quarterly stratification (Q4 2023 – Q1 2026)
